data.title: ZenaTech to Present its Latest Drone Interceptors, Counter-UAS Defense System, ZenaDrone, and Zena AI Developments at Upcoming Investor Conferences and Industry Events
data.description: ZenaTech will showcase its newest technologies at upcoming investor conferences, including the latest drone interceptors and Counter-UAS Defense System. The company will also present updates on ZenaDrone and Zena AI developments. This presentation is aimed at highlighting ZenaTech's innovative products and advancements in the field of unmanned aerial systems. The presentations are expected to draw in a large audience interested in the latest developments in drone technology.

data.title: M1X Global Announces Public Launch and Oversubscribed $3 Million Angel Round to Scale On-Chain Sovereign Finance
data.description: In New York, M1X Global, a financial technology firm, revealed its official debut and successful completion of a $3 million angel funding round, which attracted more investment than anticipated. The funding, consisting of a mix of strategic investments and grants, will aid in the advancement of the platform and expedite the acceptance of USDM1 by regulated institutions. USDM1 is a unique treasury collateralized sovereign debt instrument denominated in USD that is issued by a sovereign entity directly on a public blockchain network.

data.description: Athens, Greece - March 26, 2026 - OceanPal Inc., a leading global shipping company and digital asset treasury operator listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SVRN, has revealed its financial performance for the fiscal year concluded on December 31, 2025. The company shared its annual financial report, as well as upcoming financial projections for the...

data.title: yoummday Wins a Texas Instruments 2025 Supplier Excellence Award
data.description: Based in Miami, the company yoummday has recently disclosed that they have been chosen as the recipient of the prestigious 2025 Texas Instruments Supplier Excellence Award. This recognition represents TI's highest level of acknowledgment for suppliers that demonstrate outstanding dedication and commitment. The annual award is bestowed upon select companies that exceed expectations in their partnership with Texas Instruments, reflecting excellence in their performance.

data.title: OceanPal Inc. Announces Reverse Stock Split to be Effective March 30, 2026
data.description: Athens, Greece - OceanPal Inc. (NASDAQ: SVRN) revealed its decision for a one-for-twenty reverse stock split of its common shares, valued at $0.01 per share. Shareholders of the Company were informed about this move by the board of directors on March 26, 2026.

data.title: Sagewind Capital Announces Sale of Aechelon Technology to Shield AI
data.description: On March 26, 2026, Sagewind Capital, a private equity firm specializing in defense and government technology, revealed a firm agreement to sell its portfolio business, Aechelon Technology, to Shield AI. The deal is anticipated to be finalized soon, marking a significant development in the industry.

data.title: Hisense Advances a Quiet Green Revolution in Home Entertainment
data.description: In Dubai, UAE, on March 26, 2026, the well-known brand Hisense, recognized for its quality consumer electronics and home appliances worldwide, is at the forefront of promoting energy-efficient technology in the industry. With sustainability becoming a key focus in everyday technology, Hisense is leading the way in advancing innovative solutions. Each year, Hisense contributes significantly to the drive for eco-friendly practices, aligning with global efforts to prioritize environmental consciousness.

data.title: Senator Lummis Says America Can't Wait Until 2030, But Coinbase Still Blocking Stablecoin Bill
data.description: Coinbase (NASDAQ: COIN) has once again declined to support the Clarity Act due to concerns over stablecoin yield provisions. This decision has prompted backlash from Senator Cynthia Lummis (R-Wyo.), who highlighted that rejecting the bill now could mean waiting until 2030 for another opportunity for crypto legislation to pass. Coinbase reiterated its stance to Senate offices, citing significant worries about the language related to stable yield. This is the second time CEO Brian Armstrong has withdrawn support, asserting a preference for no bill over a flawed one. The legislation would prohibit crypto platforms from compensating users for holding stablecoins, akin to how banks pay interest on savings accounts. As per Punchbowl News, Coinbase stands to lose considerable revenue from... (Full story on Benzinga.com)

data.title: MillerKnoll Outlook Hit By Middle East Conflict
data.description: Furniture company MillerKnoll Inc. (NASDAQ: MLKN) experienced a notable drop in premarket trading following the release of its third-quarter fiscal 2026 results. The company's net sales saw a 5.8% increase from the previous year, reaching $926.6 million, which fell short of the expected $942.0 million. While North America Contract revenue grew by 4.4% to $488.6 million and International Contract revenue rose by 7.8% to $156.9 million, Global Retail sales also climbed by 7.1% to $281.1 million. Orders experienced a 9.2% year-over-year increase to $931.6 million, or 7.2% organically, driven by strong performance in North America Contract and Global Retail segments. However, adjusted operating margin dropped to 5.7% from 6.6% compared to the previous year.

data.title: Heathos Expands Insurance Ecosystem with Unified Life Insurance Platform for Modern Agency Distribution
data.description: Heathos, a leading insurance services ecosystem, has recently introduced a unified life insurance platform in Alpharetta, Georgia. The platform consolidates carriers, products, and commission reporting into a single infrastructure to aid in the growth of multi-product agencies. Launched on March 26, 2026, this centralized system aims to streamline operations and enhance efficiency.

data.title: SonoSim Launches Breast Ultrasound Clinical Training Series
data.description: Access to remote, safe breast screening education is now possible. SonoSim, Inc., a top company in ultrasound education, recently unveiled its Introduction to Breast Ultrasound Clinical program. The announcement was made on March 26, 2026, in VENICE, Calif. This new initiative allows for education on non-invasive breast screening techniques through virtual resources.

data.title: MedSpeed Appoints Ross Lieb as Chief Financial Officer
data.description: A highly experienced leader with expertise in finance and operations has joined a health care logistics company in Elmhurst. On March 26, 2026, MedSpeed, known for offering same-day logistics solutions to the health care sector, revealed the selection of the new executive. This move is part of the company's strategy to enhance its growth and expand its operations.

data.title: Leon Shimkin Helped Create The Book Publishing Industry
data.description: In 1924, Leon Shimkin joined Simon & Schuster, a recently established publisher, ultimately transforming the sector significantly. His impact on the book publishing industry over the years has been substantial.

data.title: Eberjey and ILIA Debut "Silk Rituals"
data.description: Eberjey, a high-end sleepwear brand, and ILIA Beauty, a clean beauty innovator, have collaborated to launch Eberjey x ILIA: Silk Rituals, a limited-edition capsule collection that combines skincare with sleepwear. Introduced on March 26, 2026, in Miami and Laguna Beach, this exclusive collaboration aims to offer consumers a unique blend of luxury pajamas and clean beauty products. This partnership showcases the fusion of relaxation and beauty, providing customers with a new approach to pampering themselves. The Eberjey x ILIA: Silk Rituals capsule collection is expected to attract a considerable following due to its innovative concept and the reputation of the brands involved. This collaboration marks a significant step towards redefining the intersection of skincare and fashion, with a strong emphasis on quality and luxury.

data.title: Global Times: China hosts multiple key forums, spotlighting co-op, opening-up, to inject stability in an uncertain world
data.description: In Beijing on March 26, 2026, a robot efficiently carries out the tasks of selecting ingredients, threading them onto skewers, and delivering a candied hawthorn skewer. Simultaneously, at the same location, a duet of robots showcases their skills on electronic keyboards while musical accompaniment fills the area. These captivating displays demonstrate the seamless integration of robotics into daily activities, showcasing the potential of automation in enhancing efficiency and entertainment.

data.title: iOPEX Recognized for Outcome-driven Enterprise Transformation in HFS Horizons: Agentic Services, 2026 Report
data.description: A company, iOPEX Technologies, has recently been acknowledged as a Horizon 2 Enterprise Innovator in the HFS Horizons: Agentic Services, 2026 report. This recognition highlights the company's achievements in the field of artificial intelligence.

data.title: Darcy Partners Reveals 2025 Top Innovators Reshaping the Energy Industry
data.description: Each year, Darcy Partners, a prominent technology research and advisory firm in the energy industry, unveils a list recognizing emerging technology providers making headway with energy operators in the oil and gas, power, and utilities sectors. This year, the announcement took place in Houston on March 26, 2026. This list sheds light on companies gaining traction within the sector and showcases the increasing adoption of innovative solutions.

data.title: Tales & Trails | Beijing: Where ancient legacy meets high tech
data.description: On March 26, 2026, in Beijing, participants can embark on a tour led by China Daily journalist Erik Nilsson to discover the city's enduring allure while glimpsing into its technologically advanced future. Exploring Beijing reveals a blend of ancient customs and modern innovations. The tour offers a unique perspective on the city's rich history and its path towards technological advancement, showcasing a seamless integration of tradition and innovation.

data.title: IceCure Announces Pricing of $4.0 Million Registered Direct Offering and Concurrent Private Placement
data.description: In Caesarea, Israel, on March 26, 2026, IceCure Medical Ltd. revealed exciting news. Being listed on Nasdaq as ICCM, the company specializes in innovative cryoablation technology. This method involves freezing tumors as an alternative to traditional surgical removal. IceCure shared that they have developed a minimally-invasive technique for destroying tumors. This news signifies a groundbreaking advancement in medical technology, potentially revolutionizing tumor treatment.
